message:
chore(audit): record batch 416 (async-specific pattern audit)

Systematic audit of async-Rust-specific patterns across channel, sync,
stream, and combinator modules:
- Pin safety: all get_mut() calls on Unpin types only
- Waker management: will_wake() + clone_from() consistently used
- Pending returns: wakers always registered or delegated
- Cancel-safety: two-phase reserve/commit with RAII guards
- Drop cleanup: all futures with registered wakers have proper Drop

0 bugs found. Total session: 31 bugs fixed across 100+ files audited.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
